name: Choco-Banana Supreme Shake
recipeInstructions:
1. Into each of 4 sections of an ice cube tray, pour 2 tablespoons (Tbls) of soda. The sections should be about 2/3 full.
2. Freeze the cubes until solid.
3. Wrap the banana in plastic freezer wrap and freeze until solid.
4. In a blender, combine the remaining 1/2 cup of soda, frozen half of the banana, dairy drink mix, and peanut butter.
5. Process at high speed until smooth, scraping down the sides of the container as necessary.
6. Add the soda cubes, one at a time, processing after each addition until the ice is dissolved (the mixture will be thick).
7. Serve immediately.
Makes one serving: 1 P, 1 Fa, 1 Fr, 1 M, 2 opt. cals.
Variation: Omit peanut butter and lose 1P and 1 Fa.
